name: mb_fpocc
m5_band: INFO regression: FP pipe occupancy (fdiv occ 39 / fmul occ 2) holds the pipe so following independent integer ops queue behind it; abs-cyc tracks the oracle
note: Regression for finding [high] FP occupancy/throughput. A single fdiv + 8 independent movs runs ~2x too fast vs the oracle if occupancy is dropped; with the M5 fp_occ pipe-hold the abs-cyc tracks the p5model golden.
